title: Nuve's Woodcutter Recipe
body:
_This datapack is a port from a bedrock add-on that I created._

Wasting a ton of wood? With this datapack you can now safe wood by crafting all your planks, fence, wood, stripped logs, even boats using stonecutter!

**Down here are the list of all recipe in this datapack:**

<details>
<summary>All planks</summary>

![All planks variant excluding bamboo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2b472f1e447cce49132d564230ffa78c8239306.gif)
![All bamboo planks variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee0a17c1fcc0c3522d7993f7cb3a704f40f40bc.gif)

</details>



<details>
<summary>All logs and stems</summary>

![All logs variant excluding stems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/266700c9109771241cb8ab575707919dfbfc29ff.gif)
![All stems variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f50f3d258c7ae61f71860f01ef8d89f127bfded1.gif)
![All stripped logs variant excluding stems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c9f560d854014f59f2aa8512b6e45e86bc633d6.gif)
![All stripped stems variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab134cecb65d14d06198b090e2277c567cf146d5.gif)

</details>



<details>
<summary>All wood and hyphaes</summary>


![All woods variant excluding hyphaes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7e0ecbdad6a8f7c0e561a3f07545d5237005c84.gif)
![All hyphaes variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/403f0869ad4ea04156b26ee2a35e5b99a2aa3fd1.gif)
![All stripped woods variant excluding hyphaes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1e0f1db7aab822c06a571a3cf82b4e6662e6879.gif)
![All stripped hyphaes variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40eb6893c2051873bffcf4cbfa106dfbf85ccb64.gif)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Bamboo block and stripped bamboo block</summary>

![Bamboo block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/714d84b54645281fb6a21818959ccb26c2b2cf24.jpeg)
![Stripped bamboo block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd11463e80989ecd69192bc896e4cce0a8a46612.jpeg)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Recycle recipes</summary>

![Slabs into planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83d672fd9c6096415d88b38a4f87acc81262557.gif)
![Stairs into 3 planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8aa43c2f0a1e300c1fb1f5a977f07f02b4599318.gif)

_* ignore the mosaic slab recipe (it's fixed in current bedrock and datapack version. I'm just too lazy to edit the gif :p)._

</details>

If there's a bug, fell free to dm me at my CurseForge page (I'm still new at this datapack thing): [NuveZall](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nuvezall/projects)
